title: Beyond code generation: rethinking engineering productivity in the age of AI agents
summary: How Dropbox is moving from AI tools that assist engineers to agentic systems that can execute scoped tasks, and how we’re building platforms to support those workflows.

event_model_payload.headline: Beyond code generation: rethinking engineering productivity in the age of AI agents
event_model_payload.summary: How Dropbox is moving from AI tools that assist engineers to agentic systems that can execute scoped tasks, and how we’re building platforms to support those workflows.

title: Introducing Nova, our internal platform for coding agents
summary: Nova lets engineers run multiple coding sessions in parallel and lets internal systems use AI agents as part of automated workflows.
